items.summary: Rollback would use the latest valid backup set
items.details: Would use prefix espocrm-prod at 2026-04-18_10-00-00 with manifest REPLACE_MANIFEST_JSON.

items.summary: Runtime and container preparation would run
items.details: The db service is not running now, so rollback would start it temporarily before restore. Application services are already stopped. Readiness waits would share a 600 second timeout budget.

items.summary: An emergency recovery point would be created
items.details: Would write a pre-rollback recovery point under REPLACE_BACKUP_ROOT using prefix espocrm-prod before any destructive restore step.
Would destructively reset database espocrm from REPLACE_DB_BACKUP using the contour db service.
Would replace REPLACE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/prod/espo from REPLACE_FILES_BACKUP. Parent directory REPLACE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/prod is writable and has enough free space for the selected files backup.

items.summary: Contour restart and readiness checks would run
items.details: Would run docker compose up -d and wait up to 600 seconds for the contour to become ready. The final HTTP probe would check http://127.0.0.1:18080.
